audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Deuteronomy / Devarim firstfruits creed, third-year tithe declaration, and covenant-avowal text, draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for firstfruits basket, historical creed, Exodus liberation, household rejoicing with Levite and sojourner, third-year tithe accounting, purity declaration, heavenly blessing, and mutual covenant avowal.

verses.restored: It shall be, when you enter land YHWH your Divine gives you as inheritance, and you possess it and dwell in it,
you shall take from first of all fruit of ground that you bring from your land YHWH your Divine gives you, put it in basket, and go to place YHWH your Divine chooses to cause his name to dwell there.
You shall come to priest who is in those days and say to him, I declare today to YHWH your Divine that I have entered land YHWH swore to our fathers to give us.
Priest shall take basket from your hand and set it down before altar of YHWH your Divine.

You shall answer and say before YHWH your Divine: A wandering/perishing Aramean was my father; he went down to Egypt and sojourned there, few in number, and there became a nation great, mighty, and numerous.
Egyptians treated us badly, afflicted us, and placed upon us hard service.
We cried to YHWH, Divine of our fathers, and YHWH heard our voice and saw our affliction, our toil, and our oppression.
YHWH brought us out from Egypt with strong hand and outstretched arm, with great terror, signs, and wonders.
He brought us to this place and gave us this land, land flowing with milk and honey.
And now, look, I have brought first of fruit of ground that you gave me, YHWH. You shall set it down before YHWH your Divine and bow before YHWH your Divine.
You shall rejoice in all good YHWH your Divine gave you and your house—you, Levite, and sojourner in your midst.
When you finish tithing all tithe of your produce in third year, year of tithe, and give it to Levite, sojourner, orphan, and widow, and they eat within your gates and are satisfied,

then you shall say before YHWH your Divine: I have removed holy portion from house and also given it to Levite and sojourner, orphan and widow, according to all command you commanded me; I have not crossed your commands and I have not forgotten.

I have not eaten from it in my mourning, and I have not removed from it in uncleanness, and I have not given from it for dead; I have listened to voice of YHWH my Divine; I have done according to all you commanded me.
Look down from your holy dwelling, from heavens, and bless your people Israel and ground you gave us, as you swore to our fathers, land flowing with milk and honey.
This day YHWH your Divine commands you to do these statutes and judgments; you shall keep and do them with all your heart and all your soul/life.
YHWH you have avowed today to be your Divine, to walk in his ways, keep his statutes, commands, and judgments, and listen to his voice.
And YHWH has avowed you today to be for him a treasured people, as he spoke to you, and to keep all his commands,
and to set you high above all nations he made, for praise, name, and splendor, and for you to be a holy people to YHWH your Divine, as he spoke.

translation_notes: The firstfruits ritual makes land produce inseparable from historical memory: vulnerability, migration, slavery, crying out, liberation, and gift.

Arami oved avi is famously ambiguous: 'a wandering/perishing Aramean was my father' or, in a major Jewish interpretive tradition, 'an Aramean sought to destroy my father.' Both require respectful Jewish reception audit.
Deuteronomy 26:5-8 became central to the Passover Haggadah and must not be detached from living Jewish liturgy.
The worshiper does not celebrate alone; Levite and sojourner share the good.
The third-year declaration requires concrete accounting that Levite, immigrant, orphan, and widow have eaten and been satisfied.
Election and exaltation language expresses covenant vocation and holiness, not racial or national superiority.
The heavenly blessing request must not become prosperity theology or proof that those lacking harvest failed morally.
safety_note: Do not appropriate the firstfruits creed against Jewish tradition, turn land gift into colonial entitlement, or use covenant blessing as prosperity propaganda. Center migration memory, liberation from forced labor, gratitude, shared joy, and auditable provision for immigrants, orphans, widows, and landless servants.
